overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator showing a first-person driver's perspective navigating urban streets during a heavy rainstorm. The bus travels along wet asphalt roads with active windshield wipers, passes construction barriers, stops at bus stops to serve passengers, and drives through intersections with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with bus stop and construction zone

events.description: bus accelerates from stationary position at the bus stop
passing a teal colored car on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the bus stop and merging into the flow of traffic while windshield wipers maintain visibility

notable_agents.action: teal car driving ahead in the same direction
white car visible through the side window

entered.detail: green glass and metal bus shelter with bench seating
red and white striped plastic construction barriers lining the left side of the road
mature deciduous trees forming a canopy over the right sidewalk
illuminated green LED display showing bus route number and destination

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the bus accelerating from a stop at a green bus shelter. Construction barriers line the left side of the wet asphalt road while trees form a canopy on the right. The bus passes a teal car as it merges into traffic, with windshield wipers actively clearing heavy rain from the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight urban road with construction barriers and tree canopy

events.description: yellow truck passes in the opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the straight road with active windshield wipers clearing rain

notable_agents.action: yellow truck driving in the opposite direction with headlights on

entered.detail: blue circular parking sign with white P symbol mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The bus cruises along a straight urban road lined with construction barriers on the left and a tree canopy on the right. The windshield wipers continue their rhythmic motion as the bus passes a yellow truck traveling in the opposite direction. Road markings and parking signs are visible through the rain-streaked windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop area with shelter and waiting passengers

events.description: bus slows down and comes to a complete stop at the designated bus stop
pedestrians visible waiting at the bus stop shelter on the right

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at the bus stop to serve passengers, with the bus positioned next to the shelter

notable_agents.action: motorcycle scooter parked at the bus stop shelter
person standing under the shelter waiting to board the bus

entered.detail: green metal and glass bus shelter with transparent panels and bench seating
circular red and white no entry traffic signs mounted on poles
green public waste container near the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops at a bus stop shelter where a motorcycle is parked and pedestrians are waiting. No entry signs are visible ahead as the bus comes to a halt. The construction barriers continue on the left but are now further in the distance, while the bus serves passengers in the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with multi-story residential and commercial buildings

events.description: bus accelerates away from the bus stop and approaches the intersection
entering a wider intersection area with prominent red apartment buildings visible

agents.ego_description: pulling away from the bus stop and navigating through an urban intersection with other traffic

notable_agents.action: pink colored car parked along the right curb
oncoming vehicle with headlights approaching the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story red brick residential apartment building with multiple windows
zebra crossing pedestrian markings across the intersection
white facade commercial building with large windows at street level

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates away from the stop and enters a wider urban intersection. Red apartment buildings rise on the left while commercial buildings line the right side. The bus navigates through the crosswalk area as construction barriers reappear on the left closer to the vehicle. Parked cars including a pink vehicle are visible along the curb as the bus continues through the rainy city streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver navigating a rain-slicked urban corridor that transitions from a tree-lined street into a wide city intersection. It begins with the bus accelerating from a green shelter, passing construction barriers and a teal car while windshield wipers rhythmically clear the heavy rain. As the bus cruises forward, the scene maintains a steady flow past a yellow truck and various road signs before slowing to a halt at a second shelter where pedestrians wait beside a parked motorcycle. The camera then shifts as the bus accelerates once more, leaving the shelter behind to enter a broader intersection framed by red apartment buildings and commercial structures. Finally, the view glides through a crosswalk past a pink parked car, with construction barriers reappearing along the curb as the vehicle continues through the rainy cityscape.
